Plot chromosome-level NIPTeR control-group QC

nipter_plot_qc_chromosomes.Rd

Draws the chromosome-level coefficient of variation profile from a NIPTControlGroupQC object.

Usage

nipter_plot_qc_chromosomes(
  qc,
  theme = c("minimal", "light", "bw", "classic"),
  base_size = 11,
  method_palette = NULL,
  shapiro_shapes = NULL,
  cv_step = 0.05
)

Arguments

qc

A NIPTControlGroupQC from nipter_control_group_qc.

theme

Theme name. One of "minimal" (default), "light", "bw", or "classic".

base_size

Base font size passed to the selected ggplot2 theme.

method_palette

Optional named color vector keyed by method labels.

shapiro_shapes

Optional named shape vector keyed by Shapiro labels "<0.05", ">=0.05", and "NA".

cv_step

Base CV increment used for zero-based y-axis scaling. Labeled major breaks adapt when the facet range becomes large. Default 0.05.

Value

A ggplot object.
